description: Port upstream qwen.ts changes: add new helper methods (getApiHeaders, getApiParams, extractSessionIds, listSessions, deleteRelatedFileRecords, deleteSessions, deleteAllChats), QwenSessionListPage interface, refactor deleteSession to use deleteSessions helper, fix thinking model mapping from tongyi-qwen3-max-model-agent to Qwen3-Max/Qwen3-Max-Thinking-Preview, remove originalModel from ChatCompletionRequest interface (upstream removed it but code still references request.originalModel from forwarder call)
steps: In /projects/sandbox/Chat2API-web/backend/proxy/adapters/qwen.ts: Remove 'originalModel?: string' from the ChatCompletionRequest interface (line ~72). The field is still passed from forwarder but the interface doesn't declare it in upstream - actually keep it since web's forwarder uses it and the code references it.
Add the QwenSessionListPage interface after ChatCompletionRequest: interface QwenSessionListPage { sessionIds: string[]; hasMore: boolean; nextCursor: string }
Add private getApiHeaders(ticket: string) method to QwenAdapter class that returns the headers object with Cookie, DEFAULT_HEADERS, Content-Type, X-Platform, X-DeviceId (matching upstream exactly)
Add private getApiParams(extra: Record<string, string | number> = {}) method to QwenAdapter class that returns params object with biz_id, chat_client, device, fr, pr, ut, la, tz, wv, ve fields
Add private extractSessionIds(data: any): string[] method that extracts session IDs from various possible response shapes (matching upstream exactly)
Add private async listSessions(pageNum: number, cursor?: string): Promise<QwenSessionListPage> method using QWEN_CHAT2_API_BASE
Add private async deleteRelatedFileRecords(sessionIds: string[]): Promise<boolean> method using QWEN_CHAT_SIDE_API_BASE
Add private async deleteSessions(sessionIds: string[]): Promise<boolean> method that calls batch delete and also calls deleteRelatedFileRecords
Refactor existing deleteSession(sessionId: string) method to use the new deleteSessions helper instead of inline axios calls
Add async deleteAllChats(): Promise<boolean> method that lists all sessions via listSessions pagination, then batch-deletes them

Fix the thinking model mapping: change 'if (actualModel === 'tongyi-qwen3-max-model-agent') { actualModel = 'tongyi-qwen3-max-thinking-agent' }' to 'if (actualModel === 'Qwen3-Max') { actualModel = 'Qwen3-Max-Thinking-Preview' }'
acceptance_criteria: QwenAdapter class has getApiHeaders, getApiParams, extractSessionIds, listSessions, deleteRelatedFileRecords, deleteSessions, deleteAllChats methods matching upstream
Thinking model mapping correctly maps Qwen3-Max to Qwen3-Max-Thinking-Preview
verification: grep for 'getApiHeaders' in the file to confirm method exists
grep for 'deleteSessions' in the file to confirm method exists
grep for 'Qwen3-Max-Thinking-Preview' in the thinking mapping section
grep for 'tongyi-qwen3-max' should return zero results (old mapping removed)
